prompt: A high-end photorealistic lifestyle shot of a cozy traditional kitchen table with a futuristic twist. On a warm rustic wooden table sits a steaming bowl of hearty soup, a plate of golden traditional hand-pies (pirozhki), and a glass jar of preserves. A subtle teal and lime-green neon holographic interface floats above the food, displaying abstract data visualizations and nutrition charts. In the foreground, a person's hand holds a sleek modern smartphone, framing the plate through the camera lens. The lighting is a mix of warm homey sunset glow and cool cybernetic blue/green accents. Cinematic depth of field, premium textures, 8k resolution, vertical composition.
negative_prompt: readable text, letters, numbers, watermark, QR code, logo, brand name, distorted fingers, extra digits, blurry face, messy background, low resolution, cartoon, illustration
notes: Blended 'Grandma's house' warmth with the brand's signature teal/green neon aesthetic.
Used the 'phone framing' technique from ref_shopping_mode to visualize the app's scanning feature.
Replaced specific text/numbers with 'abstract data visualizations' to avoid AI-generated gibberish.
Maintained the premium wood texture from main_menu.png to keep the lifestyle feel grounded.
